notes: When used on a block, `ambient_occlusion` and `face_dimming` should be set to `false`{lang=json} in any [material instances](/blocks/block-components#material-instances).

This model should only be used in combination with render methods that apply backface culling (`"alpha_test_single_sided"`{lang=json}, `"blend"`{lang=json} and `"opaque"`{lang=json}) to avoid texture flickering.
When used by a block with the `"opaque"`{lang=json} render method, a shadow is cast onto surrounding blocks and adjacent block faces are culled.

This model cannot be used in format versions prior to [1.26.0](/blocks/block-format-history#_1-26-0) as backwards compatibility mapping results in `minecraft:geometry.full_block_v1` being used instead.
**Deprecated** — the bottom face of this model is rotated 180 degrees compared to vanilla full blocks so `minecraft:geometry.full_block` should be used instead.
When used by a block with the `"opaque"`{lang=json} render method, a shadow is cast onto surrounding blocks and adjacent block faces are culled.
